name: Pasha Prabasakti
headline: Focused on scalable backend systems, data-driven architecture, and maintainable services. I care about consistency, performance, and code that remains reliable as systems grow.
summary: I am a fresh graduate from vocational high school with a strong interest in software development. I focus on writing clean and efficient code while building applications that are simple, functional, and user-friendly. I enjoy learning modern web technologies and continuously improving my skills through hands-on projects.
care-about: I care about designing robust backend systems with clear architecture and strong performance. I prioritize maintainability, efficient resource usage, and building APIs that scale without becoming complex or difficult to manage.

about.title: Building scalable systems with a clean, practical approach.

availability: Open for freelance and part-time opportunities
